title: selago coerulea
intro: Selago coerulea, also known as blue-flowered selaginella, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Selago coerulea is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety need further scientific research and validation.
